title: Man, 36, dies and three arrested after altercation in Tredegar
description: A 36-year-old man has died following a "physical altercation", Gwent Police say.
content:
Three men have been arrested on suspicion of murder after a 36-year-old man died following a "physical altercation".
Gwent Police said the men, aged 18, 19 and 51, were arrested following an incident in Tredegar town centre, Blaenau Gwent, between 22... [283 chars]

title: T20 World Cup: India beat New Zealand to defend title
description: India banish the ghosts of 2023 by emphatically beating New Zealand by 96 runs in Ahmedabad to defend their T20 World Cup title.
content:
India banished the ghosts of 2023 by emphatically beating New Zealand by 96 runs in Ahmedabad to defend their T20 World Cup title.
On the same ground they wilted under pressure and expectancy two and a half years ago against Australia in the 50-over ... [3741 chars]

title: UK health agency investigating London Legionnaires' disease cluster
description: The wider risk to public health is said to be low as the disease is not usually passed from person to person.
content:
Specialists from Britain's Health Security Agency (UKHSA) are investigating a cluster of Legionnaires’ disease cases linked to north and southwest London.
The public health body is working to discover whether the cases are linked and to establish the... [2140 chars]

title: Israeli president says 'mind boggles' at doubts over legality of Iran war
description: Isaac Herzog says Israel is acting out of "self-defence" on behalf of Israel, the wider region and Europe.
content:
Israel's President Isaac Herzog has told the BBC his "mind boggles" at questions over the legality of the war on Iran, saying it was necessary for self-defence in the face of Tehran's nuclear and military ambitions.
